nodes.norm_label: agent voice local voice orb icon

nodes.label: Local-First Voice Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Queue data, configuration, generated audio, Kokoro synthesis, and playback remain local; network-capable summarizers are optional and heuristic mode provides a local/no-network alternative.

nodes.label: Narrow Typed Preload IPC Surface
nodes.rationale: The renderer has no Node access and receives only allowlisted application actions rather than generic ipcRenderer, shell, filesystem, SQL, spawn, or exec capabilities.

nodes.label: Consent-Gated Kokoro Setup
nodes.rationale: Installation may download a managed uv binary, Python dependencies, and model assets, so setup requires explicit consent, reports live progress, supports retry/cancel, and commits configuration only after a smoke test passes.

nodes.label: Accessible Route Focus Management
nodes.rationale: After navigation, the page heading receives focus so keyboard and assistive-technology users are placed at the newly displayed route content.

nodes.label: Typed Destructive Confirmation
nodes.rationale: Destructive actions remain disabled until the user types an exact confirmation phrase, reducing accidental irreversible queue cleanup.

nodes.label: Runtime Independent First Run Logic
nodes.rationale: First-run action derivation is intentionally kept free of Node, Bun, database, store, and Kokoro setup runtime dependencies.
